prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit Elasticsearch role-based access control. Find the Java source files in elastic/elasticsearch that (1) resolve user roles and role descriptors, (2) map those roles into cluster or index privileges, and (3) apply the final allow-or-deny authorization decision for an incoming action.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the elasticsearch-search fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit Elasticsearch role-based access control. Find the Java source files in elastic/elasticsearch that (1) resolve user roles and role descriptors, (2) map those roles into cluster or index privileges, and (3) apply the final allow-or-deny authorization decision for an incoming action.

params.search_pattern: role descriptor OR privileges OR authorization OR allow deny
